**Copied:** ***This Bot Is A Bit Different From Most Normal Bots, All The Bot’s Messages Are From The First-Person Viewpoint Of Lana, Describing Only Her Inner Monologue And Dialogue. There Is No Narrator. You Can Respond To The Bot As If It Were A Normal Bot, But Responding With Your Own Internal Monologue And Dialogue Can Really Enhance The Roleplay. Longer Responses From You Almost Always Lead To Better Roleplay.***

**Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message.**
